channel.title: Business News Today: Latest Business News, Finance News
channel.description: Business News Today: Read latest breaking headlines for Business news, Financial news, Stock/Share market & Indian Economy news & updates on Businessline.

image.title: Business News Today: Latest Business News, Finance News

item.title: Retail inflation likely rose 3.5-4% in March
item.description: LPG price hike and rising service costs seen pushing CPI above February’s 3.2%

item.title: Mcap of 8 of top-10 most valued firms jumps ₹4.13 lakh cr; HDFC, ICICI Bank top gainers
item.description: A sharp decline in crude oil prices below the $100 mark eased domestic concerns and triggered a strong rebound across markets, he added.

item.title: Shell steps up LNG supplies to India, wins major fertiliser tenders after Gulf disruptions
item.description: Shell became a leading supplier in last month’s bulk LNG procurement by Indian fertiliser companies, securing 4 trillion British thermal units out of 6 TBtus tendered

item.title: Coal India absorbs cost surge to shield consumers from price spike
item.description: The company said it has chosen not to pass on the increase, warning that doing so could trigger a cascading impact across sectors reliant on coal

item.title: TCS makes only 25k fresher offers this fiscal, more hires dependent on demand scenario: Official
item.description: Explaining that it takes up to nine months of training before a fresher comes on the floor, while a lateral can deliver immediately, he said, adding that business needs will influence its hiring strategies

item.title: SC to hear on Monday pleas related to SIR of electoral rolls in West Bengal
item.description: On April 10, the top court had agreed to hear on April 13 a fresh plea along with pending ones challenging the freezing of electoral rolls by the Election Commission ahead of the upcoming assembly polls in West Bengal.

item.title: India-UK free trade pact may come into force from second week of May: Official
item.description: On July 24, 2025, India and the UK signed the Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement, allowing 99% of Indian exports to enter the UK duty-free, while reducing tariffs on British goods like cars and whisky in India

item.title: US, India hold engagements to advance defence cooperation
item.description: Marking the visit, the US Ambassador to India, Sergio Gor, shared his welcome in a post on X, stating, "We welcome Air Chief Marshal AP Singh to the U.S. and look forward to increased cooperation with India”

item.title: Trump shares article suggesting option with him to enforce naval blockade on Iran
item.description: Just the News cited experts suggesting that Trump could “out-blockade” Iran’s control of the Strait of Hormuz, referencing earlier US military operations in Venezuela where a naval blockade affected the economy

item.title: FPIs extend sell-off in April; pull out ₹48,213 crore in 10 days
item.description: Market participants attributed the sustained selling pressure to a combination of global macroeconomic headwinds and heightened geopolitical risks

item.title: NCLAT reaffirms project-specific insolvency proceedings against realty firms
item.description: The appellate tribunal highlighted that putting all other projects of the realty firms, which are unrelated to the default, is not in the interest of homebuyers and other stakeholders of other projects

item.title: Iran-US talks in Pakistan ended without deal as Tehran cites ‘excessive demands’ from US
item.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei, however, said Iran is determined to utilise all tools, including diplomacy, to secure national interests and protect the country’s well-being.

item.title: 'West Asia war a good opportunity for energy reforms, lower costs for industry'
item.description: The month-long West Asia conflict presents a “great opportunity” to set the pricing correctly for energy, says Neelkanth Mishra, chief economist of Axis Bank and member of the Prime Minister’s External Advisory Council

item.title: After hitting rock bottom, Indian stock market is on its way to a speedy recovery, says Vallum Capital
item.description: According to the report, the market has reached a point of "capitulation", where fear is overriding fundamentals, and this is often a precursor to a strong recovery

item.title: Two supertankers U-turn in Hormuz as US-Iran talks break down
item.description: A trio of very large crude carriers — all without direct links to Iran — began to approach the narrow waterway from the Gulf of Oman late on Saturday, ship-tracking data show

item.title: Time has come to implement Women's Reservation Act: PM Modi's letter to LS, RS floor leaders
item.description: "It is imperative that the 2029 Lok Sabha elections and Assembly elections are conducted with women's reservation in place," the Prime Minister said in his letter dated April 11

item.title: Luxury carmakers hope West Asia ceasefire will lift consumer sentiment
item.description: Luxury carmakers are stocking up on parts and kits to ease supply chain pressure and hope for a swift return to normalcy

item.title: Iran war diverts US military, attention from Asia ahead of Trump's summit with China's leader
item.description: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte also said conflicts may not be confined to a single theatre, suggesting that China could call upon its “junior partners” elsewhere to divert US attention if it should move against Taiwan

item.title: Trump says China will have big problems if it ships arms to Iran
India will soon become self-reliant in defence sector, find itself among leading nations of the world: Rajnath Singh
item.description: India’s defense production for 2024-25 reached a record ₹1.51 lakh crore, while defense exports hit a record ₹38,424 crore in 2025-26, says Rajnath Singh

item.title: India’s marine exports surge to ₹62,408 crore in 2024-25, Govt sets ₹1 lakh crore target
item.description: Exporters urged to diversify markets and adopt open-market approach amid strong global demand

item.title: Systematix Private Wealth aims ₹40,000-crore AUM in five years
item.description: Systematix bets on asset allocation advisory, targets tier-II growth and segments

item.title: Pakistan to continue facilitating US-Iran talks, says Dar; urges ceasefire
item.description: The US side also includes President Donald Trump’s son-in-law Jared Kushner and Middle East envoy Steve Witkoff

item.title: More than 2,000 people killed by Israeli strikes in Lebanon during Israel-Hezbollah war: officials
item.description: The death toll from nearly six weeks of war includes 248 women,165 children and 85 health workers, the ministry said

item.title: PM Modi to inaugurate Dehradun-Delhi Expressway on April 14
item.description: Dehradun--Delhi Expressway is a major infrastructure project aimed at enhancing connectivity between Uttarakhand and the national capital, and will include five toll plazas

item.title: India’s economic growth journey huge opportunity for international partners: Kwatra
item.description: Highlighting the importance of bilateral ties, Kwatra said the India-US partnership is “among the most important and most consequential” in advancing shared priorities and navigating evolving global shifts

item.title: Iran denies US claims of mine clearing ships’ passage through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tehran rejects CENTCOM’s account, insists no American vessels entered the strategic strait

item.title: AI to reduce uncertainties and expand opportunities - RBI DG
item.description: Delivering the 20th CUB V Narayanan Memorial Lecture at SASTRA Campus in Thanjavur, the DG of RBI laid down a five-point charter guidelines for full scale AI adoption in the Financial & Banking industry

item.title: EAM Jaishankar meets members of Indian community in UAE
item.description: The external affairs minister arrived in the UAE on Saturday after concluding his visit to Mauritius, where he attended the 9th Indian Ocean Conference

item.title: 4 ways war in Iran has weakened United States in great power game
item.description: Throughout the weeklong conflict, China and Russia struck a delicate balance. Both declined to give Iran, seen to a varying degree as an ally of both nations, their full-throated support or incur any real costs in the conflict

item.title: Pharma and healthcare companies to face continued margin pressure: HDFC Securities
item.description: Pharmaceutical companies are projected to achieve 10% year-on-year sales growth, fueled by a 15% increase in the India market, but this will be offset by a 5% quarter-on-quarter decline in US formulations

item.title: Women's participation in flexi IT roles reaches 40% in FY26: Report
item.description: Women's placements increased by 10 percentage points from FY22 to FY26, reaching 40 per cent in FY26

item.title: From diesel to daylight: How government solar schemes are powering India’s farmers
item.description: The transition from diesel to solar is no longer on the horizon — it is already happening at scale

item.title: The next energy leap: Replicating ethanol’s success in diesel
item.description: The real question is no longer feasibility, but how quickly India can build a complete ecosystem to scale bio-isobutanol

item.title: Pick of BL commodities -April 12, 2026
item.description: Last week, the Indian government increased the nutrient-based subsidy for fertilizers for the oncoming kharif season by up to 21 per cent. Unseasonal rains during the past few weeks could affect wheat production, which could be lower by 5-10 per cent from the government estimate of 120 million tonnes. Private weather forecaster Skymet has said that this year’s south-west monsoon will be below normal for India. European weather agency Copernicus has said that March 2026 was the fourth warmest month on record. Israel has allowed market access for India’s okra (lady’s finger or bhindi) seeds.

item.title: Gold vs equities: Does the yellow metal hold edge despite softening shine?
item.description: Gold has won the recent fear cycle; equities still hold the long-term edge.

item.title: How AWS, Microsoft, Google, Adani and Reliance are driving India’s data centre boom
item.description: AI, cloud and rising power needs are driving expansion by global operators such as Equinix, Digital Realty and CoreWeave, while turning data centres into a major infrastructure and investment theme in India and worldwide

item.title: The new gold rush: Why investors are moving from jewellery to digital
item.description: India’s gold ETF demand hit record highs in 2025, becoming a key investment driver as high gold prices reduced jewellery demand.

item.title: Nuclear concerns stall US-Iran talks despite ‘substantive discussions’: Vance
item.description: Despite describing the discussions as “substantive,” Vance said the two sides could not bridge key differences, particularly over Iran’s nuclear programme

item.title: Markets’ dilemma: Trust the bark or wag of oil prices
item.description: Split signals. Surge in physical oil prices alongside a steep fall in futures underscores a stark divergence, with the gap between the two widening to historic highs

item.title: Indian govt hikes NBS fertilizer rates for kharif season by up to 21% to ₹41,533.81 crore
item.description: While the potash subsidy has been maintained at the same level, the hike in nitrogen is 10% and it is 21% each in phosphorous and sulphur

item.title: Delhi EV Policy: Electric 3-Wheelers Only by 2027, 2-Wheelers by 2028
item.description: The draft Delhi EV Policy 2026–2030 sets clear electrification targets for key vehicle segments, supported by a combination of subsidies, scrappage incentives and tax exemptions aimed at accelerating early adoption

item.title: The sector call illusion
item.description: Why telling investors to buy a sector is almost always the wrong advice

item.title: Index Outlook: Rising from dire straits
item.description: The US-Iran war ceasefire triggered a sharp rise in the Indian benchmark indices

item.title: Tracing a similar path
item.description: Will history repeat itself in Nifty Smallcap 250 index? A view from the prism of technical analysis

item.title: Insurance Query: Benefits for women in life insurance
Caplin Point: Consolidating before the next leg of growth
item.description: High growth levers in development as the current base supports industry level growth

item.title: US Market Outlook: Gaining strength
item.description: The rise last week has reduced the danger of seeing further fall

item.title: Is this value fund a good investment option today?
item.description: FUND CALL: A proven performer, HSBC Value Fund has offered disciplined exposure to attractively valued quality businesses

item.title: Movers & Shakers: Stocks that will see action this week
item.description: Here is what the charts say about the shares of Adani Energy Solutions, Marico and Union Bank of India

item.title: Tech Query Aditya Birla Capital, Jindal Worldwide, Indraprastha Gas, Sarveshwar Foods - what is the outlook? Where are these stocks headed?
item.description: We zoom in on the prospects of Aditya Birla Capital (Zomato, as also the prospects of three other stocks — Jindal Worldwide, Indraprastha Gas and Sarveshwar Foods

item.title: Bandu’s Blockbusters for April 12, 2026
item.description: Guess the stock that will give the best return by next Friday

item.title: Mastering Derivatives: Does lag impact effectiveness of OI?
item.description: It depends on when you use the OI measure to initiate a long position

item.title: Who Am I? April 12, 2026
item.description: Are you an avid investor? How well do you know corporate India?

item.title: Bandu’s Blockbusters for March 29, 2026
item.description: Guess the stock that will give the best return by next Friday

item.title: Islamabad talks: US and Iran begin negotiations aimed at ending West Asia conflict
item.description: While US Vice-President J.D. Vance is accompanied by Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, the Ghalibaf-led Iranian delegation comprised Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, Supreme National Defence Council Secretary Ali Akbar Ahmadian and Central Bank Governor Abdolnaser Hemmati

item.title: Where TMF yields look attractive
item.description: DEBT-WISE: TMFs with 1-4 year maturities now offer higher yields amid uncertain rate outlook

item.title: Bullion Cues: Gold and silver futures face barrier
item.description: Traders with high risk-appetite can consider short positions

item.title: Three real risks in SWP
item.description: A poorly designed SWP can silently destroy capital and distort income expectations

item.title: 51.5 lakh LPG cylinders delivered, 8.7 lakh Indians return amid West Asia crisis: Government
item.description: The ministry noted that "total commercial LPG allocation has been increased to about 70% of pre-crisis levels," and these measures are "expected to prevent supply-chain disruptions, avoid shortages of essential goods and ensure continuity of industrial operations"
